issue.message: If intercepting back events, this should be handled through the registration of callbacks; see https://developer.android.com/guide/navigation/custom-back/predictive-back-gesture
If intercepting back events, this should be handled through the registration of callbacks; see https://developer.android.com/guide/navigation/custom-back/predictive-back-gesture
Implicitly using the default locale is a common source of bugs: Use `String.format(Locale, ...)` instead
Call requires API level 36.1 (current min is 36): `android.media.AudioDeviceVolumeManager#setDeviceAbsoluteMultiVolumeBehavior`
Call requires API level CUR_DEVELOPMENT/10000 (current min is 36): `android.media.BluetoothProfileConnectionInfo#createHfpInfo`
Call requires API level CUR_DEVELOPMENT/10000 (current min is 36): `android.media.BluetoothProfileConnectionInfo#createHfpInfo`
Class requires API level 36.1 (current min is 36): `android.media.AudioDeviceVolumeManager.OnAudioDeviceVolumeChangedListener`
Call requires API level CUR_DEVELOPMENT/10000 (current min is 36): `android.media.AudioManager#isScoManagedByAudio`

Do not guard log invocations with if blocks using log enforcement variables or isLoggable(). The Log framework does this check for you. Remove the surrounding if block and call to log completely unguarded

Do not guard log invocations with if blocks using log enforcement variables or isLoggable(). The Log framework does this check for you. Remove the surrounding if block and call to log completely unguarded

Avoid passing `null` as the view root (needed to resolve layout parameters on the inflated layout's root element)

`mEncryptionStateReceiver` is missing `RECEIVER_EXPORTED` or `RECEIVER_NOT_EXPORTED` flag for unprotected broadcasts registered for android.bluetooth.device.action.ENCRYPTION_CHANGE

Method `AvrcpBipClient.connect` is missing a @RequiresPermission annotation or it's too narrow. It calls APIs that require {allOf=[android.permission.BLUETOOTH_CONNECT, android.permission.BLUETOOTH_PRIVILEGED]} but is only annotated with [none].

Method `BassClientService.unsyncSource` is missing a @RequiresPermission annotation or it's too narrow. It calls APIs that require {allOf=[android.permission.BLUETOOTH_SCAN]} but is only annotated with [none].

Method `BassClientService.handleSelectSourceRequest` is missing a @RequiresPermission annotation or it's too narrow. It calls APIs that require {allOf=[android.permission.BLUETOOTH_SCAN]} but is only annotated with [none].

Method `BassClientStateMachine.processPASyncState` is missing a @RequiresPermission annotation or it's too narrow. It calls APIs that require {allOf=[android.permission.BLUETOOTH_SCAN]} but is only annotated with [none].

Method `BassClientStateMachine.initiatePaSyncTransfer` is missing a @RequiresPermission annotation or it's too narrow. It calls APIs that require {allOf=[android.permission.BLUETOOTH_SCAN]} but is only annotated with [none].
issue.errorLine1: private void initiatePaSyncTransfer(int syncHandle, int sourceId) {

issue.message: Method `BassClientStateMachine.connectGatt` is missing a @RequiresPermission annotation or it's too narrow. It calls APIs that require {allOf=[android.permission.BLUETOOTH_CONNECT]} but is only annotated with [none].

Method `BluetoothGattTestableWrapper.discoverServices` is missing a @RequiresPermission annotation or it's too narrow. It calls APIs that require {allOf=[android.permission.BLUETOOTH_CONNECT]} but is only annotated with [none].

Method `BatteryStateMachine.connectGatt` is missing a @RequiresPermission annotation or it's too narrow. It calls APIs that require {allOf=[android.permission.BLUETOOTH_CONNECT]} but is only annotated with [none].

Method `BatteryStateMachine.disconnectGatt` is missing a @RequiresPermission annotation or it's too narrow. It calls APIs that require {allOf=[android.permission.BLUETOOTH_CONNECT]} but is only annotated with [none].

Method `Disconnected.enter` is missing a @RequiresPermission annotation or it's too narrow. It calls APIs that require {allOf=[android.permission.BLUETOOTH_CONNECT]} but is only annotated with [none].

Method `GattCallback.onServicesDiscovered` is missing a @RequiresPermission annotation or it's too narrow. It calls APIs that require {allOf=[android.permission.BLUETOOTH_CONNECT]} but is only annotated with [none].
issue.errorLine1: public void onServicesDiscovered(BluetoothGatt gatt, int status) {

issue.message: Method `GattCallback.onCharacteristicRead` is missing a @RequiresPermission annotation or it's too narrow. It calls APIs that require {allOf=[android.permission.BLUETOOTH_CONNECT]} but is only annotated with [none].

Method `BluetoothMnsObexClient.connect` is missing a @RequiresPermission annotation or it's too narrow. It calls APIs that require {allOf=[android.permission.BLUETOOTH_CONNECT, android.permission.BLUETOOTH_PRIVILEGED]} but is only annotated with [none].

Method `BluetoothOppManager.enableBluetooth` is missing a @RequiresPermission annotation or it's too narrow. It calls APIs that require {allOf=[android.permission.BLUETOOTH_CONNECT]} but is only annotated with [none].

Method `BluetoothOppManager.disableBluetooth` is missing a @RequiresPermission annotation or it's too narrow. It calls APIs that require {allOf=[android.permission.BLUETOOTH_CONNECT]} but is only annotated with [none].

Method `BluetoothOppTransfer.startConnectSession` is missing a @RequiresPermission annotation or it's too narrow. It calls APIs that require {allOf=[android.permission.BLUETOOTH_CONNECT]} but is only annotated with [none].

Method `SapService.initSocket` is missing a @RequiresPermission annotation or it's too narrow. It calls APIs that require {allOf=[android.permission.BLUETOOTH_CONNECT]} but is only annotated with [none].
Broadcast action requires {allOf=[android.permission.BLUETOOTH_CONNECT, android.permission.BLUETOOTH_PRIVILEGED]} but call is protected with {allOf=[android.permission.BLUETOOTH_CONNECT]}.
Exported receiver does not require permission
Exported service does not require permission
Exported service does not require permission
Google Play requires that apps target API level 33 or higher.

Provide a timeout when requesting a wakelock with `PowerManager.Wakelock.acquire(long timeout)`. This will ensure the OS will cleanup any wakelocks that last longer than you intend, and will save your user's battery.

Provide a timeout when requesting a wakelock with `PowerManager.Wakelock.acquire(long timeout)`. This will ensure the OS will cleanup any wakelocks that last longer than you intend, and will save your user's battery.

Provide a timeout when requesting a wakelock with `PowerManager.Wakelock.acquire(long timeout)`. This will ensure the OS will cleanup any wakelocks that last longer than you intend, and will save your user's battery.

Provide a timeout when requesting a wakelock with `PowerManager.Wakelock.acquire(long timeout)`. This will ensure the OS will cleanup any wakelocks that last longer than you intend, and will save your user's battery.

Provide a timeout when requesting a wakelock with `PowerManager.Wakelock.acquire(long timeout)`. This will ensure the OS will cleanup any wakelocks that last longer than you intend, and will save your user's battery.

Provide a timeout when requesting a wakelock with `PowerManager.Wakelock.acquire(long timeout)`. This will ensure the OS will cleanup any wakelocks that last longer than you intend, and will save your user's battery.
This `AsyncTask` class should be static or leaks might occur (anonymous android.os.AsyncTask)
Do not place Android context classes in static fields (static reference to `BluetoothOppManager` which has field `mContext` pointing to `Context`); this is a memory leak
Do not place Android context classes in static fields (static reference to `MediaPlayerWrapper` which has field `mContext` pointing to `Context`); this is a memory leak
This `Handler` class should be static or leaks might occur (anonymous android.os.Handler)

issue.errorLine1: <string name="download_line5" msgid="4124272066218470715">"ફાઇલ પ્રાપ્ત થઈ રહી છે ..."</string>

issue.message: The application adaptive icon is missing a monochrome tag
This text field does not specify an `inputType`
Missing accessibility label: provide either a view with an `android:labelFor` that references this view or provide an `android:hint`
Do not concatenate text displayed with `setText`. Use resource string with placeholders.
When you define `paddingStart` you should probably also define `paddingEnd` for right-to-left symmetry
Call requires API level CUR_DEVELOPMENT/10000 (current min is 36): `android.telephony.SmsManager#sendStoredTextMessage`
Call requires API level CUR_DEVELOPMENT/10000 (current min is 36): `android.telephony.SmsManager#sendStoredMultipartTextMessage`
Call requires API level CUR_DEVELOPMENT/10000 (current min is 36): `android.os.Trace#asyncTraceForTrackBegin`
Call requires API level CUR_DEVELOPMENT/10000 (current min is 36): `android.os.Trace#asyncTraceForTrackEnd`
Call requires API level CUR_DEVELOPMENT/10000 (current min is 36): `android.media.AudioManager#handleBluetoothHfpAudioDisconnected`
